payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark-stained wooden cabinet with two raised rectangular paneled doors, a narrow central seam/gap, visible wood grain and subtle wear; bottom edge is cropped by the image — approximately 1.0 m from camera.
